---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement

---

## 🌟 Feature Description
Describe the feature you want to implement.

## 🧩 Why Is This Needed?
Explain why this feature is useful or important.

## 🛠 Proposed Solution
Describe how you plan to implement it.

## 📘 Additional Notes
Anything else that may help us understand.
